---
title: "Final Project"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-07"
---

```{r library}
library(dplyr)
library(rstan)
library(tidyverse)
library(bayesrules)
library(MASS)
library(rstanarm)
library(ggplot2)
library(bayesplot)
```

```{r priorData}
prior_eqs <- read_csv("data/earthquakes_before_1950.csv")

prior <- prior_eqs[, c("time", "mag")]
prior$datetime <- as.POSIXct(prior$time, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OSZ", tz = "UTC")
prior <- prior[order(prior$datetime), ]
prior$intertime <- c(NA, as.numeric(
  difftime(prior$datetime[-1],prior$datetime[-nrow(prior)], units="days")))
prior$Display <- round(prior$intertime, 2)
head(prior, 1)
```

```{r priorParamsT}
#T ~ Gamma(2, theta)
between_time <- prior$intertime[!is.na(prior$intertime)]

#E(T)
E_T <- mean(between_time)

shape = 2
#E(T) = shape/rate
rate <- 2/E_T


ggplot(data.frame(T = between_time), aes(x = T)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), bins = 40, fill = "grey") +
  stat_function(fun = dgamma,
                args = list(shape = shape, rate = rate),
                color = "red",
                linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Gamma Fit to Pre-1950 Inter-event Times",
    x = "Days Between Earthquakes",
    y = "Density"
  )

c(shape, rate)
```


```{r PriorParamsTheta}
theta_exp <- rate
theta_var <- theta_exp^2 / 5
#theta_exp = a/b
#theta_var = a/b^2
b <- theta_exp / theta_var
a <- theta_exp * b

plot_gamma(a, b)


```


```{r source}
data <- read.csv("data/earthquake.csv")
head(data)
```

```{r cleaning}
earthquake <- data[, c("time", "mag")]
earthquake$datetime <- as.POSIXct(earthquake$time, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OSZ", tz = "UTC")
earthquake <- earthquake[order(earthquake$datetime), ]
earthquake$intertime <- c(NA, as.numeric(
  difftime(earthquake$datetime[-1],earthquake$datetime[-nrow(earthquake)], units="days")))
earthquake$Display <- round(earthquake$intertime, 2)
head(earthquake)
```

```{r parameters}
tObs <- earthquake$intertime[!is.na(earthquake$intertime)]
n <- length(tObs)
sum <- sum(earthquake$intertime, na.rm = TRUE)
lastDate <- max(earthquake$date)
xDay <- as.numeric(difftime(Sys.Date(), lastDate, units="days"))

#theta ~ Gamma(a,b) prior
c(a, b)
#posterior
aPost <- a + 2*n
bPost <- b + sum
```

```{r model}
model <- "
data {
  int<lower=1> N;
  vector<lower=0>[N] T;
}
parameters {
  real<lower=0> theta;
}
model {
  T ~ gamma(2, theta);
  theta ~ gamma(5.0, 1120.523);
}
"
```

```{r MCMC}
simulation <- stan(model_code=model, data=list(N = n, T = tObs),
                   chains=4, iter=5000*2, seed=1234,
                   refresh=FALSE)
bayesplot::mcmc_trace(simulation, pars="theta", size=0.5)
bayesplot::mcmc_hist(simulation, pars="theta")
bayesplot::mcmc_dens_overlay(simulation, pars = "theta")
```

```{r summary}
summary(simulation, pars="theta")
```



```{r density}
priorTheta <- rgamma(10000, shape = a, rate = b)
postTheta <- as.data.frame(simulation, pars = "theta")$theta
plot(density(priorTheta), lwd = 3, col = "black",
     xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "Density",
     main = expression("Prior and Posterior of " * theta), 
     ylim = range(c(0, 1000)))
lines(density(postTheta), lwd = 3, col = "red")
legend("topright", legend = c("Prior", "Posterior"), col = c("black", "red"), lwd = 3)

plot(density(priorTheta), lwd = 3, col = "black",
     xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "Density",
     main = expression("Prior of " * theta))

plot(density(postTheta), lwd = 3, col = "red",
     xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "Density",
     main = expression("Posterior of " * theta), 
     ylim = range(c(0, 1000)))

cred_int_95 <- quantile(postTheta, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
head(cred_int_95)
```

```{r predictiveInterval}
remainDays <- (xDay + 2/postTheta) / (1+postTheta*xDay)
summary(remainDays)

hist(remainDays, prob=TRUE, col="gray80",
     xlab="days",
     main="Posterior Preditive Remaining Time til Next Earthquake")
abline(v=mean(remainDays), col="red", lwd=3)

df_remain <- data.frame(days = remainDays)

ggplot(df_remain, aes(x = days)) +
  geom_density() +
  labs(title = "Posterior Predictive Remaining Time",
       subtitle = "Days until next earthquake, given time already elapsed",
       x = "Remaining Days",
       y = "Density")
```

```{r prediction pre-transformation}
#this is graph is prediction interval relative to last earthquake that happened
check_sim <- as.data.frame(simulation)
check_sim <- check_sim %>%
  mutate(y_predict = rgamma(n = n(), shape = 2, rate = theta))

ggplot(check_sim, aes(x = y_predict)) + 
  geom_density() +
  labs(title = "Posterior Predictive Distribution (Time from last earthqake)",
       x = "Predicted Days until Next Earthquake",
       y = "Density")

prediction_int <- quantile(check_sim$y_predict, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))

ggplot() +
  geom_density(aes(x = tObs, color = "Observed Data")) +
  geom_density(aes(x = check_sim$y_predict, color = "Model Prediction")) +
  labs(title = "Model Fit Check", x = "Days between Earthquakes", y = "Density") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed Data" = "black", "Model Prediction" = "red"))

```

```{r prediction post-transformation}
#this is graph is prediction interval relative today
check_sim <- check_sim %>% 
  mutate(days_from_today = y_predict - xDay)

check_sim_future <- check_sim %>% 
  filter(days_from_today > 0)

head(check_sim_future)

ggplot(check_sim_future, aes(x = days_from_today)) +
  geom_density() +
  labs(title = "Predicted Days UNTIL Next Earthquake (From Today)",
       x = "Days from Now",
       y = "Density")
prediction_int_today <- quantile(check_sim_future$days_from_today, probs = c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975))
```

```{r posterior odds, prior odds, and Bayes Factor?}
#should we include this?
```

Given `r xDay`days have passed since the last M8+ earthquake worldwide, the expected remaining waiting time until the next one is about `r mean(remainDays)`days. 

```{r daysProb}
daysVec <- quantile(remainDays, probs = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1))

sapply(daysVec, function(d) {
  probInDays <- (
    pgamma(xDay + d, shape = 2, rate = postTheta) -
    pgamma(xDay, shape = 2, rate = postTheta)
  ) / (
    1 - pgamma(xDay, shape = 2, rate = postTheta)
  )
  mean(probInDays)
})
```
